title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 78.100 - Candidate to file statement
text:
78.100.  Candidate to file statement. — Any person desiring to become a candidate for mayor or councilman shall file with the city clerk a statement of such candidacy in substantially the following form: 
(RSMo 1939 § 7060, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971, A.L. 1998 H.B. 1807) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6910; 1919 § 8377
